name: Lateral Movement Containment
description: Response playbook for incidents where lateral movement has been detected. Focuses on isolating compromised segments and preventing further spread.

steps.name: Map affected network segments
steps.description: Use the Digital Twin to identify all reachable nodes from the compromised system. Map the blast radius.

steps.name: Implement emergency segmentation
steps.description: Deploy emergency ACLs to segment affected network zones. Block inter-VLAN routing for compromised segments.

steps.name: Reset credentials in affected zone
steps.description: Force password reset for all accounts that authenticated in the compromised zone. Revoke active sessions and tokens.

steps.name: Hunt for persistence
steps.description: Scan all systems in the blast radius for persistence mechanisms: scheduled tasks, services, registry keys, web shells.

steps.name: Validate containment
steps.description: Verify no new lateral movement indicators. Confirm all C2 channels are blocked. Run follow-up Digital Twin simulation.
